entry.title: Gentle Is The Heart You Let Me Hold
entry.summary:
Author: LeenyLeens

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,507Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 3

Summary: Jason expected many things, but not a call telling him you're at the Police Station on a Wednesday morning. The entire ordeal and it's aftermath remind him that you see the good in everyone, even him.

entry.title: Good Luck, Babe!
entry.summary:
Author: VenusCrytrap

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 168,760Chapters: 32/?Kudos: 3,330

Summary: A decade after washing out of your mask, you try to piece together a decent life as Bruce Wayne's only civillian adoptee. Your father believes that you deserve more than what the manor has to offer. If only his wards got the memo.

entry.title: Chase the Fox
entry.summary:
Author: Gendermessness

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,556Chapters: 5/5Kudos: 31

Summary: "Jason?" a voice suddenly calls out. His brothers freeze and stare towards the door. Soft footsteps pad closer, and a young man appears, clad in only a pair of boxers and a t-shirt that clearly doesn't belong to him. After two years of dating, you finally meet Jason’s brothers. At 4 in the morning. In your bathroom. Bleeding. To their surprise you take it in stride. You joke, you make hot beverages and Jason lets you openly shower him with affection. But what they don’t know is that you’re the rogue henchman Batman has been chasing for years. And the consequences of your secret is catching up to you and Jason

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: The House hunger built
entry.summary:
Author: FearTheHime

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 109,949Chapters: 21/?Kudos: 659

Summary: "Of course I eat people, I mean...It's not something I would broadcast since it's...well Gotham and they began to make a phad about it because the citizens are brilliantly...stupid."Bodies are piling up, whatever is left. Families; different backgrounds, different ethnics, religions, looks are being eaten and whatever is left into a master piece. Some sort of art with the remains and everyone was losing time and leads to find out who has been feasting upon Gotham citizens. Jason however, knew of a Cannibal that he totally never mentioned to Bruce. It's not Jason's fault he died before revealing his darkest discovery and that discovery is in the form of a boy he had left behind. [M/N] [L/N]; Mortitan, brilliant, a chef of his own making and conisear of flesh.All Jason needed to do is sweeten the deal in a way that drives all people, after all at the end of the day {M/N] is human after all."Besides..it's people...they are literally born every day..so who cares if a few of them...just disapear once in a while?"

entry.title: Do I Wanna Know?
entry.summary:
Author: chlo_caineandabel

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,128Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 12

Summary: What happens when a lonely girl and boys who's alone meet? They bond. Not because they only have each other, but because they don't understand one another. You were siting alone in the park with seventeen minutes left till midnight. Seventeen minutes left of your birthday. A slightly stale cupcake you received from the bakery that closed ten minutes ago sits beside you on the bench. The moon rolls about in the sky as it slowly takes its place in the dark canvas of the sky. Out of the silence of the night, you hear someone's voice. "What brings you out here so late at night?"

entry.summary:
Author: vanillameringuecookie

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,234Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 16

Summary: Working under a pseudonym as a burglar was supposed to be the easy way out of your miserable life. But in a twisted turn, tangled up with stuff you shouldn’t have ever messed with, Red Hood finds you.   That might be the worst thing that’s happened to you.

entry.title: Between Bookcases
entry.summary:
Author: northstargirl

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 78,235Chapters: 20/?Kudos: 1,497

Summary: Jason made a habit of spending late nights in the university library whenever he sought an escape from his militia activity. It's by chance that you happen to be one of the only other regular late night visitors as well. As summer turns to fall, you become ensnared in a plot against your will. *follows the plot of, and continues after the events of arkham knight

entry.title: Getting Around Gotham, or: Five Drabble Trysts with Batfam Men, and One 3500 Word Epilogue About How You All Realized It
entry.summary:
Author: gone (relocation)

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,125Chapters: 7/7Kudos: 82

Summary: A fresh arrival in Gotham and trying to meet new people, you find yourself entangled with five different men, unaware that they are all connected, just as they are unaware of each other's connection to you, until you all end up at one party. (In your defence, they all had different surnames.) - Inspired by every time I've thought "What if someone dated everyone in the Batfam, and never realized it because they all have different surnames?"- Written for the characters in general, most recently (but certainly not only) influenced by WFA- Only Jason got outright smut, sorry Dick et al.- Drabbles can pretty much be enjoyed separately, but they are meant to be read together with the longer epilogue.- The extra 125 words (chapter 7) are not part of the fic and will only be there temporarily

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: The trees will fall (but i will keep standing by you)
entry.summary:
Author: Morningstar_knight

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 18,970Chapters: 9/?Kudos: 36

Summary: District 7. The Lumber District. It hurts when you are reaped. It hurts being taken from your family. It hurts seeing your fellow Tribute, Jason Todd, and knowing you two probably won’t survive this years Hunger Games. (No promises on when next chapter is, I'll have to re-edit and beta read each one. Start from the beginning if you're an old reader, because I re-edited 1 through 8. And if you're a new reader... enoy!)

entry.title: Regrets do die hard
entry.summary:
Author: PlsGiveMeBFnamjoonChuseyo

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,220Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 5

Summary: Soulmates do exist. And when they do find one another they experience severe head ache and witness eachothers memories and each others initials appear on their wrists. He never did want to find his soulmate. But he did. And.. maybe deep down he always wanted to find his soulmate. So when he did.. why did she run away? (1st part of the story is of Jason when he was Robin, 17-years-old. No sexual implications, obviously)(2nd part of the story is after jason resurrects. There will be more plot in this part!! And maybe smut idk)

entry.title: ALL LIES
entry.summary:
Author: Monnypie3

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,082Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 18

Summary: SUMMARY: Jason and you weren’t friends. He only knew you as Dick’s best friend. But when his family starts to get on his nerves and try to interfere in his love life—and Dick tries to interfere in yours—you both decide to help each other. This leads you both down a path of no return. Will it be possible to move forward without getting hurt?
